mapper.sql: word_id, word, type, status, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sensitive_word WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY word ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensitive_word WHERE word = #{word} AND status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sensitive_word ( word_id, word, type, status, create_time ) VALUES
(#{word.wordId}, #{word.word}, #{word.type}, #{word.status}, #{word.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensitive_word WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sensitive_word WHERE type = #{type} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM sensitive_word WHERE word = #{word} AND status = 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE sensitive_word SET status = 0 WHERE word_id IN
#{wordId}
UPDATE sensitive_word SET word = #{word}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE word_id = #{wordId}
